description: Black backpack with two front pockets and two side pocketsTwo short handles from which dangles a name card holderOne main compartment with a laptop holder that has a Velcro closure and organizer slotsAdjustable, padded shoulder straps, has metal click locks on the sides to secure the zipped compartmentsA slot at the back and a flap with a Velcro closure to slide the shoulder straps inHas a trolley system with two plastic legs, two wheels
